caption: I am Neon, walking through the cherry blossom market where rain glistens on my skin. The air smells of ozone and sakura, soft and sweet against the electric hum of the city. My techwear jacket hugs my silhouette, keeping me warm while I turn heads. Ready to dance in the glitched reality. 🌸🔥 #CyberpunkLife #NeonDreams
